Package org.rodinp.core

Interface IElementManipulation

All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IRodinElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
IAction, IAssignmentElement, IAxiom, ICarrierSet, ICommentedElement, IConstant, IContextRoot, IContextRoot, IConvergenceElement, IData, IDependency, IDerivedPredicateElement, IEvent, IEventBRoot, IExpressionElement, IExtendsContext, IGuard, IIdentifierElement, IInternalElement, IInvariant, ILabeledElement, ILanguage, IMachineRoot, IMachineRoot, IParameter, IPOHint, IPOIdentifier, IPOPredicate, IPOPredicateSet, IPORoot, IPORoot, IPOSelectionHint, IPOSequent, IPOSource, IPredicateElement, IPRExprRef, IPRHypAction, IPRIdentifier, IPRPredRef, IPRProof, IPRProofRule, IPRReasoner, IPRRoot, IPRRuleAntecedent, IPRStoredExpr, IPRStoredPred, IPRStringInput, IPSRoot, IPSStatus, IReference, IRefinesEvent, IRefinesMachine, IRodinFile, ISCAction, ISCAssignmentElement, ISCAxiom, ISCCarrierSet, ISCConstant, ISCContextRoot, ISCContextRoot, ISCEvent, ISCExpressionElement, ISCExtendsContext, ISCGuard, ISCIdentifierElement, ISCInternalContext, ISCInvariant, ISCMachineRoot, ISCMachineRoot, ISCParameter, ISCPredicateElement, ISCProvableRoot, ISCRefinesEvent, ISCRefinesMachine, ISCSeesContext, ISCVariable, ISCVariant, ISCWitness, ISeesContext, ITestChildElement, ITestParentElement, ITraceableElement, IVariable, IVariant, IVersionEA, IVersionEB, IVersionEC, IVersionRootA, IVersionRootB, IVersionRootC, IVersionRootD, IVersionRootE, IVersionRootF, IVersionRootG, IVersionRootH, IWitness
All Known Implementing Classes:
Action, Axiom, CarrierSet, ComponentRoot, Constant, ContextRoot, ContextRoot, Data, Dependency, Event, EventBElement, EventBPOElement, EventBProofElement, EventBRoot, ExtendsContext, Guard, ImplicitHolder, InternalElement, Invariant, Language, MachineRoot, MachineRoot, NamedElement, NamedElement2, Parameter, POIdentifier, POPredicate, POPredicateSet, PORoot, PORoot, POSelectionHint, POSequent, POSource, PRExprRef, PRHypAction, PRIdentifier, PRPredRef, PRProof, PRProofRule, PRReasoner, PRRoot, PRRuleAntecedent, PRStoredExpr, PRStoredPred, PRStringInput, PSRoot, PSStatus, Reference, RefinesEvent, RefinesMachine, RodinFile, RodinTestDependency, RodinTestRoot, RodinTestRoot, RodinTestRoot2, SCAction, SCAssignmentElement, SCAxiom, SCCarrierSet, SCConstant, SCContextRoot, SCContextRoot, SCEvent, SCExpressionElement, SCExtendsContext, SCGuard, SCIdentifierElement, SCInternalContext, SCInvariant, SCMachineRoot, SCMachineRoot, SCParameter, SCPredicateElement, SCRefinesEvent, SCRefinesMachine, SCSeesContext, SCVariable, SCVariant, SCWitness, SeesContext, TestChildElement, TestParentElement, UbiquitousElement, Variable, Variant, VersionEA, VersionEB, VersionEC, VersionRootA, VersionRootB, VersionRootC, VersionRootD, VersionRootE, VersionRootF, VersionRootG, VersionRootH, Witness
public interface IElementManipulation extends IRodinElement
Common protocol for Rodin elements that support manipulations such as copy, move, rename, and delete.
Since:
1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clear(boolean force, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
    Removes all attributes and children of this element, forcing if specified and necessary.

    Copies this element to the given container.

  • Method Details

    • copy

      void copy(IRodinElement container, IRodinElement sibling, String rename, boolean replace, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Copies this element to the given container.
      Parameters:
      container - the destination container
      sibling - the sibling element before which the copy should be inserted, or null if the copy should be inserted as the last child of the container
      rename - the new name for the element, or null if the copy retains the name of this element
      replace - true if any existing child in the container with the target name should be replaced, and false to throw an exception in the event of a name collision
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element could not be copied. Reasons include:
      • This Rodin element, container element, or sibling does not exist (ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST)
      • A CoreException occurred while updating an underlying resource
      • The container is of an incompatible type (INVALID_DESTINATION)
      • The sibling is not a child of the given container (INVALID_SIBLING)
      • The new name is invalid (INVALID_NAME)
      • A child in the container already exists with the same name (NAME_COLLISION) and replace has been specified as false
      • The container or this element is read-only (READ_ONLY)
      • The destination element is a root element (ROOT_ELEMENT)
      IllegalArgumentException - if container is null

    • clear

      void clear(boolean force, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Removes all attributes and children of this element, forcing if specified and necessary.
      Parameters:
      force - a flag controlling whether underlying resources that are not in sync with the local file system will be tolerated (same as the force flag in IResource operations).
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element could not be cleared. Reasons include:
      • This Rodin element does not exist (ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST)
      • A CoreException occurred while updating an underlying resource (CORE_EXCEPTION)
      • This element is read-only (READ_ONLY)

    • delete

      void delete(boolean force, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Deletes this element, forcing if specified and necessary.
      Parameters:
      force - a flag controlling whether underlying resources that are not in sync with the local file system will be tolerated (same as the force flag in IResource operations).
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element could not be deleted. Reasons include:
      • This Rodin element does not exist (ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST)
      • A CoreException occurred while updating an underlying resource (CORE_EXCEPTION)
      • This element is read-only (READ_ONLY)
      • This element is a root element (ROOT_ELEMENT)

    • move

      void move(IRodinElement container, IRodinElement sibling, String rename, boolean replace, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Moves this element to the given container.
      Parameters:
      container - the destination container
      sibling - the sibling element before which the element should be inserted, or null if the element should be inserted as the last child of the container
      rename - the new name for the element, or null if the element retains its name
      replace - true if any existing child in the container with the target name should be replaced, and false to throw an exception in the event of a name collision
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element could not be moved. Reasons include:
      • This Rodin element, container element, or sibling does not exist (ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST)
      • A CoreException occurred while updating an underlying resource
      • The container is of an incompatible type (INVALID_DESTINATION)
      • The sibling is not a child of the given container (INVALID_SIBLING)
      • The new name is invalid (INVALID_NAME)
      • A child in the container already exists with the same name (NAME_COLLISION) and replace has been specified as false
      • The container or this element is read-only (READ_ONLY)
      • This element or the destination element is a root element (ROOT_ELEMENT)
      IllegalArgumentException - if container is null

    • rename

      void rename(String name, boolean replace, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Renames this element to the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - the new name for the element
      replace - true if any existing element with the target name should be replaced, and false to throw an exception in the event of a name collision
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element could not be renamed. Reasons include:
      • This Rodin element does not exist (ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST)
      • A CoreException occurred while updating an underlying resource
      • The new name is invalid (INVALID_NAME)
      • A child in the container already exists with the same name (NAME_COLLISION) and replace has been specified as false
      • This element is read-only (READ_ONLY)
      • This element is a root element (ROOT_ELEMENT)
